assessment_objectives.objective: risks and threats for Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) are identified.
reasonable cybersecurity and data protections that are commensurate with assessed risks and threats for Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) are defined.
reasonable cybersecurity and data protections that are commensurate with assessed risks and threats for Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) are implemented.
